payload.summary: v0.1 pricing monitoring rules: 1) Same-day bookings (lead_time=0) — flag always. 2) 1-night bookings — flag always. 3) Peak (Jun-Aug) <4 nights on 4BR+ booked >14d out — flag. 4) MinLOS baseline 3-night peak/shoulder/slow, drops to 2 within 14d. 5) ADR benchmarks: 1BR peak , 2BR , 3BR , 4BR , 6BR . 6) Late-booking-rate >50% rolling 30d — soft flag. 7) Pacing 2026 vs 2025 same-period — thresholds TBD with John.
